Localization.Description: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2024-21413 in Outlook. The vulnerability allows an attacker to send a victim an email with a hyperlink to a shared network resource and bypass the Outlook warning when opening the email. This can be used to execute an arbitrary code or get the user's NetNTLM hash.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2024-21413 in Outlook. Attempt to redirect to shared network resource {object.path} on host {event_src.host}.
